query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_instagram,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_image,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' AND (image IS NULL OR image = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_instagram_no_image,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasMenu = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_menu
FROM establishments;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_instagram,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_image,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' AND (image IS NULL OR image = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_instagram_no_image,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasMenu = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_menu
FROM establishments;
